creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
Hi,
 
 before to submit a PR, don't forget to check if there isn't one already
 opened.
 see PR #31058 for details (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=31058)
 
 anyway, thanks for your work, since I forgot to correct the
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR
 typo in Makefile, and didn't see the CFLAGS typo in files/patch-site.conf.
 
 I'm just submitting a followup to PR #31058 concerning thoses typos but
 I didn't find your PR to ask someone to close it since it is a dup to mine !
 
 see you,
 
 Cyrille.
